title: Optional Prop
description: Define object properties that are not mandatory by using the question mark syntax in your interfaces.
problemStatement:
Maybe data! Update (or redefine) the `User` interface to include an optional `bio` property (string).

**Requirement:** Use the `?` suffix on the property name.
hints: Optional properties allow objects to omit certain fields without causing a type error.
expectedOutput: An interface with an optional property
